_provenance.identifier_rename: 2026-07-13: the frame's TARGET record moved from dd1706/121 (a row of the shared dev DB, absent from the shipped install seed, so this gate could never pass on a fresh install) to dd1706/900122, which the gate now CREATES and deletes itself. _provenance.READ THIS FIRST — the target id below is: dd1706/900122 exists in NO install: test/unit/iri_dataframe_native.test.ts CREATES that record, reads through it, and DELETES it in afterAll. It refuses to start if the coordinate is already taken, so it can never overwrite or delete a record it did not make. (The frame node dd560 and the iri component test140 DO ship in the ontology — only the target record is gate-owned.)
